sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 100:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 100:1
items.html: As the upper Partzuf of MA and BON remains adhered to SAG and is not considered Nekudim, so it has an upper Partzuf to ZA that remains adhered to Ima, and is not regarded as ZA. (Inner Observation, Item 26)
